reason_held: The requested full migration would mutate live Plex-indexed path structure and webdav_map semantics.
A bounded live symlink/file probe timed out while inspecting current path mechanics, so the live path layer is not safe enough for structural mutation in this run.
Post-migration verification would require Plex scanning/refresh/indexing behavior, but this run cannot safely guarantee no visibility regression without a dedicated pilot and explicit scan gate.
Proceeding directly would risk reducing the currently visible 83/105 baseline and would violate the user hard constraint to rollback on regression.
recommendation: Run Stage B as a dedicated Orchestrator-owned pilot first: create additive traditional aliases for 3-5 visible titles, retain legacy ScarFLIX_part folders, update webdav_map additively with legacy_hash/path2_local_path fields, then run a bounded Plex scan/verification gate. Do not migrate all 83 visible titles until the pilot proves no visibility regression.
